# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-a-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: serviceA
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: serviceA
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: serviceA-container
        image: serviceA-image

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-b-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: serviceB
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: serviceB
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: serviceB-container
        image: serviceB-image

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-c-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: serviceC
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: serviceC
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: serviceC-container
        image: serviceC-image
